mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(NOTI_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TB_NOTIFICATION
INSERT INTO TB_NOTIFICATION ( NOTI_ID, MEMBER_NO, NOTI_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, LINK_URL, IS_READ, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{notiId}, #{memberNo}, #{notiType}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isRead}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, IS_READ AS isRead, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_NOTIFICATION WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC, NOTI_ID DESC

SELECT NOTI_ID AS notiId, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, IS_READ AS isRead, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_NOTIFICATION WHERE NOTI_ID = #{notiId} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTIFICATION SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND IS_READ = 'N'
